interface: Jira Cloud platform REST API v3 (issue create/edit) with Atlassian Document Format version 1

test_credentials.api_token: dummy-jira-api-token-9315 (dummy; must never appear in error text)

body.fields.issuetype: {id: <issueTypeId>} — note the lowercase wire name issuetype
body.fields.description: an ADF document — NEVER a plain string (that is the legacy v2 body shape)
body.omission_rule: optional fields the caller did not provide are omitted entirely, not sent as null

query.notifyUsers: default true; false suppresses watcher notification email
query.returnIssue: default false; true makes the edit return 200 with the issue in Get-issue format

body.fields: direct value sets (summary, description as ADF, ...)
body.update: field operations, e.g. labels: [{add: "x"}, {remove: "y"}] — label deltas go here, not in fields

edit_issue.success: 204 with no body, or 200 with the issue when returnIssue=true

adf.root: {type: "doc", version: 1, content: [<block nodes>]} — version must be the integer 1

errors.field_errors: 400/422 with a non-empty errors object → per-field validation failures (JiraFieldError in this codebase)
errors.other: 401 wrong/missing credentials, 403 permission, 404 unknown issue or no browse permission — errorMessages carries the human message
errors.redaction: neither the API token, the email, nor the base64 basic-auth blob may appear in error text
